title: HmisSimulation Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the HMIS Simulation engine. All project and organization names must end with '_' to mark them as synthetic data.

distribution_config.description: A probability distribution for sampling numeric values.

population.description: A named stage in the primary track housing journey.

project_ref.description: Name of a project in organizations. Validated semantically.

household_templates.description: Map of household template name to relative selection weight.

entry_point.description: Relative weight for new-client entry. Normalized internally.

exit_point.description: Probability that a client permanently exits the system after this enrollment ends.

prior_living_situation.description: Weighted distribution over HUD 3.917 LivingSituation codes for clients entering this population. Keys are HUD code strings (e.g. '116'). Weights normalized internally. Validated semantically against HudHelper.util.valid_prior_living_situations.

weights.description: Map of HUD LivingSituation code (string) to relative weight.

transition.description: A directed edge in the primary track state machine.

from.description: Source population name (must exist in same track).

to.description: Destination population name (must exist in same track).

weight.description: Relative selection weight. Normalized within each from-population.

timing.description: Distribution for enrollment duration in days.

gap_before_entry.description: Days between exit and next enrollment start (client is between programs).

exit_destinations.description: Map of HUD exit destination code to relative weight. Normalized internally.

ce_participation_config.description: CE participation service flags for a Coordinated Entry project (type 14).

project_in_org.description: A project inside an organization. Name must end with '_'.

hmis_participation_type.description: HUD HMISParticipationType: 1=HMIS Participating, 2=HMIS Protected. Defaults to 1.

ce_participation.description: CE participation service flags. Only applicable to CE projects (project_type 14). Defaults applied from compliance rules when omitted.

organization.description: An organization that owns one or more projects. Name must end with '_'.

data_quality.description: Rates for missing or approximate demographic data.

record_miss_rate.description: Probability of skipping creation of any required per-enrollment record (EmploymentEducation, CLS, Event, Assessment). Default 0.0025 (0.25%).

enrollment_config.description: Demographics and assessment configuration for a primary track.

ph_move_in.description: Controls when MoveInDate is set on PH enrollments. Omit or set probability to 0 to leave MoveInDate unset (client left before being housed).

probability.description: Share of PH enrollments that will ever receive a MoveInDate.

close_conditions.description: Conditions under which a lifecycle enrollment closes. At least one key is required.

housing_move_in.description: Probability this client's lifecycle enrollment closes on housing move-in.

primary_track_fields.description: Additional required fields for a primary track.

household_cohesion_probability.description: Per-member probability of re-including a household member on re-enrollment.

household_templates.description: Map of template name to demographic distribution config.

populations.description: Named stages in the housing journey for this track.

concurrent_track_fields.description: Additional required fields for a concurrent track.

applies_to_tracks.description: Primary track names this concurrent track applies to. Empty = all primary tracks.

projects.description: Project names (from organizations) to enroll clients in.

count_distribution.description: Map of count string to relative weight. '0' = client gets no enrollment.

data_error_rate.description: Probability of a data integrity error in the concurrent enrollment.

duration.description: Distribution for concurrent enrollment length in days.

reentry.description: Controls re-enrollment after a concurrent enrollment closes.

lifecycle_track_fields.description: Additional required fields for a lifecycle track.

applies_to_tracks.description: Primary track names this lifecycle track applies to. Empty = all primary tracks.

project_ref.description: Project name (from organizations) for the lifecycle enrollment.

trigger_populations.description: Population names (from any primary track) that trigger this lifecycle enrollment.

trigger_probability.description: Probability a client is enrolled when entering a trigger population.

days_before_trigger.description: Days the lifecycle enrollment opens before the primary enrollment starts.

track.description: An enrollment track. Type determines which additional fields are required.

name.description: Human-readable name for this simulation config.

data_source_id.description: ID of the GrdaWarehouse::DataSource (hmis: true) to write records into.

seed.description: Deterministic RNG seed. Same seed + same config produces identical output.

tracks.description: At least one 'primary' track is required (validated semantically).

data_quality.description: Global data quality defaults. Each primary track may override via its own data_quality.
